stemHtml: Which statement is correct about Air Traffic Advisory Services vs ATC Services?

options.a: Advisory Services do not issue clearances — they provide advisory information and may use the word "suggest".
options.b: ATC Services deliver advisories and suggestions and do not use "cleared".
options.c: ATC Services do not issue clearances — they provide hearing information.
options.d: Advisory Services issue clearances and advisory information without using "suggest".
